node.data: {"V1294":{"lit":"ու<lb xml:id=\"l104423258\" facs=\"#z104423258\" n=\"17\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104423257","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423257","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9090 copy"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"M695":{"lit":"ուրախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103912251","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103912251","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-282b"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"M892":{"lit":"ուրախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104346053","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104346053","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"892-187a"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"M6712":{"lit":"ուրախ<lb xml:id=\"l104384663\" facs=\"#z104384663\" n=\"34\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104384662","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104384662","n":"33"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-121b"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"M7227":{"lit":"ուրախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103957557","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103957557","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7227-009a"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"M8699":{"lit":"ուրախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z103940977","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103940977","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-066a"},"n":"ուրախութբ"},"V1108":{"lit":"ու<lb xml:id=\"l104423258\" facs=\"#z104423258\" n=\"17\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>րախու<abbr>թբ<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104423257","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104423257","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9090 copy"},"n":"ուրախութբ"}}
